verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I lived a wasted life That had no meaning I found no peace in anything That I tried Then I saw my life requickening And a brand new one began The day I found the Cross where Jesus died

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It's because of Calvary I'll never be the same again I found the joy I'd never thought Could ever be He took a life shattered by sin Put it together once again And oh what change there's been Because of Calvary

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now when my heart is sad And grown weary I journey in my mind Back to Calvary And I bow beneath its load That washes white as snow And I find new strength is waiting there for me.
